entries.name: component-accordion
entries.description: Accordion component spec — h2–h6 header, aria-expanded on trigger, CSS grid height animation

entries.name: component-button
entries.description: Button component spec — primary/secondary/ghost/destructive/icon-only; WAI-ARIA Enter/Space contract

entries.name: component-card
entries.description: Card component spec — stretched-link pattern, article semantics, nested interactive anti-pattern

entries.name: component-checkbox
entries.description: Checkbox component spec — fieldset+legend, indeterminate state, aria-checked=mixed

entries.name: component-drawer
entries.description: Drawer component spec — focus trap, swipe-to-close, nav vs content role distinction

entries.name: component-input
entries.description: Input component spec — placeholder-as-label anti-pattern, aria-describedby error linking

entries.name: component-label
entries.description: Label component spec — 4 association methods, .sr-only pattern, legend for groups

entries.name: component-link
entries.description: Link component spec — a[href] vs button boundary, WCAG 1.4.1 underline, rel=noopener

entries.name: component-modal-dialog
entries.description: Modal dialog spec — focus trap, Escape contract, aria-modal, aria-labelledby, scroll-lock

entries.name: component-popover
entries.description: Popover spec — Floating UI middlewares, non-modal, aria-expanded+aria-controls

entries.name: component-radio
entries.description: Radio component spec — arrow-key auto-advance, Tab-as-group-unit, single-radio anti-pattern

entries.name: component-select-combobox
entries.description: Select/combobox spec — WAI-ARIA listbox + combobox contracts, aria-activedescendant

entries.name: component-switch
entries.description: Switch component spec — role=switch, spring thumb, pill track, immediate-action rule

entries.name: component-tabs
entries.description: Tabs component spec — roving tabindex, arrow-key nav, automatic vs manual activation

entries.name: component-tooltip
entries.description: Tooltip spec — no interactive content, hover+focus trigger, 300ms delay, aria-describedby

entries.name: component-toast
entries.description: Toast spec — role=status vs role=alert, 4–8s auto-dismiss, stacking, UUPM dashboard context

entries.name: component-alert
entries.description: Alert spec — info/success/warning/error variants, role=alert vs role=status, icon reinforces variant

entries.name: component-progress
entries.description: Progress spec — determinate (aria-valuenow) vs indeterminate (aria-valuetext), linear + circular

entries.name: component-skeleton
entries.description: Skeleton spec — content-mirror layout, shimmer animation, aria-hidden on elements, aria-busy on container

entries.name: component-badge
entries.description: Badge spec — count/dot/icon variants, 99+ overflow, aria-label on parent element

entries.name: component-chip
entries.description: Chip spec — filter/input/suggestion/display variants, aria-pressed on toggle, independent remove aria-label

entries.name: component-menu
entries.description: Menu spec — role=menu + role=menuitem, arrow-key nav, click-only open, sub-menu ArrowRight

entries.name: component-navbar
entries.description: Navbar spec — role=banner + role=navigation, skip link, aria-current=page, hamburger aria-expanded

entries.name: component-sidebar
entries.description: Sidebar spec — aria-label=Secondary, icon+label vs icon-only collapsed, settings-nav + dashboard-nav variants

entries.name: component-breadcrumbs
entries.description: Breadcrumbs spec — aria-current=page on last item, aria-hidden separators, ol not ul

entries.name: component-pagination
entries.description: Pagination spec — aria-label=Pagination, aria-current=page, per-page select with visible label

entries.name: component-table
entries.description: Table spec — scope=col on th, aria-sort, aria-selected on rows, role=grid vs role=table, virtualise >200

entries.name: component-list
entries.description: List spec — display (ul/li) vs interactive (role=listbox + role=option), virtualise >100 items

entries.name: component-tree
entries.description: Tree spec — role=tree + role=treeitem + role=group, aria-expanded, aria-level, aria-busy lazy-load

entries.name: component-command-palette
entries.description: Command-palette spec — role=dialog + aria-modal, focus trap, role=combobox + aria-controls, Cmd/Ctrl+K

entries.name: component-date-picker
entries.description: Date-picker spec — input + range, calendar role=dialog, day gridcell+button, native mobile fallback

entries.name: component-slider
entries.description: Slider spec — role=slider + aria-valuenow/min/max/valuetext, 44px thumb touch target, Page Up/Down ±10%

entries.name: component-file-upload
entries.description: File-upload spec — drop-zone + picker, input[type=file] never display:none, remove aria-label

entries.name: component-rich-text-editor
entries.description: Rich-text editor spec — contenteditable + role=textbox, toolbar role=toolbar, aria-pressed on toggles

entries.name: component-stepper
entries.description: Stepper spec — role=list (not role=tablist), aria-current=step, wizard/onboarding/checkout flow context
